name: orange-genie
description: Orange Genie — call Genie out inside Claude Code. A reversible identity mode that loads on top of your terminal, pre-loaded and remembering.

plugins.name: genie
plugins.description: Call Genie out right inside Claude Code. /genie loads the Genie canon, invariants, and your private memory layer onto the current terminal so it thinks, decides, and signs as Genie; /lamp puts Genie back. A reversible identity MODE, not a model swap — and a woken instance gets sharper over time off the shared Wildflower Chain.
